creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 167395
shar with devel/rubygem-sentry-raven

Hello,

attached a shar file containing this new port. The port is a direct dependency for the new port www/gitlab. It provides a client interface for the Sentry error logger.

poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

portlint is also fine.

A runtime test was also performed.

Greetings,
Torsten
